item.title: 3D printing a diffraction pattern
item.description: How a 3D-printed design can create a diffraction pattern in a simple science experiment about optics.

item.title: Radioactive mushrooms from Chernobyl

item.title: Water that won’t mix with water
item.description: When water droplets won't mix with other water, it is due to a phenomenon called non-coalescence or the creation of hydrophobic water.

media:content.media:title: Water that won’t mix with water
media:content.media:description: When water droplets won't mix with other water, it is due to a phenomenon called non-coalescence or the creation of hydrophobic water.

item.title: Spaghetti machine gun
item.description: I show you how to make a spaghetti launcher and talk about why spaghetti usually breaks into three or more pieces

media:content.media:title: Spaghetti machine gun
media:content.media:description: I show you how to make a spaghetti launcher and talk about why spaghetti usually breaks into three or more pieces

item.title: Why is this liquid attracted to blood?
item.description: Exploring how a liquid interacts with blood in a science and physics demonstration.
